name: E-6 recommended sets: source-file rule with recommended: true must appear in recommended_set per the §17 G-13 + E-6 consistency rule
command:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    recommended: true
  - id: g-x-002
    recommended: false
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001, g-x-002]
' > tree/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-source-file.sh" --check-recommended-consistency tree/g.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && echo consistent 1>&2
